ocr_mistral.text:
Bible record of Green Hill Norman, Sr.
Eliza H. Rosson, Norman
DAU. OF HENRY ROSSON, & WIFE, REBECCA, OF TENN.
FAMILY RECORD.

|  MARRIAGES. | MARRIAGES.  |
| --- | --- |
|  Green H. Norman
and Eliza H. Norman
was married October
the 31st 1847
in Texas | Morgan A. Norman
and Roxannah Looson
was married July the
29th 1869  |
|  Louisa M. Baker
died Feb 10 1939
mtn Home Baxter Co Ark. | Asa Baker and Lou
Norman was married
Sept 19th 1872  |
|  Mary J. Ticer
died Mch 11, 1942
Flippin, Marion Co. Ark. | William M. Norman
and Sofia Baker
was married January the
11th 1874  |
|  Louisa M. Baker
died Feb 10 1937
at Mtn Home Ark. | John F. Norman and
Marg A. Alexander was
married July the 24th
1874  |
|  Sarah Emaline
"Dollie" Lee
Died Jan 6th 1951
Flippin
Marion County
Ark. | F. M. Norman
Married April 5
1885 to
Amanda Baker  |

layout_blocks.text: Bible record of Green Hill Norman, Sr.
DAU. OF HENRY ROSSON, & WIFE, REBECCA, OF TENN.
Green H. Norman and Eliza H. Norman was married October the 31st 1847 in Texas
Morgan A. Norman and Roxannah Looson was married July the 29th 1869
Louisa M. Baker died Feb 10 1939 mtn Home Baxter Co Ark.
Asa Baker and Lou Norman was married Sept 19th 1872
Mary J. Ticer died Mch 11, 1942 Flippin, Marion Co. Ark.
William M. Norman and Sofia Baker was married January the 11th 1874
Louisa M. Baker died Feb 10 1937 at Mtn Home Ark.
John F. Norman and Marg A. Alexander was married July the 24th 1874
Sarah Emaline "Dollie" Lee Died Jan 6th 1951 Flippin Marion County Ark.
F. M. Norman Married April 5 1885 to Amanda Baker

transcribe_handwriting.text:
Bible record of Green Hill Norman & Edgar H. Rosson, & Norman
Dau. of Henry Rosson, & wife, Rebecca, of Tenn.
FAMILY RECORD.

MARRIAGES.

Green H. Norman
  and Elizabeth Norman
was married October †
the 31st 1847
        in Texas

Louisa M Baker
died Feb 10-1937
          at Mt. Home Baxter Co. Ark.

Mary J Greer
died March 11, 1942
at Flippin, Marion Co. Ark.

Louisa M. Baker
died Feb 10 - 1937
    at Mtin Home Ark

Sarah Emaline
              Wllie Lee
              died June 6th 1951
          Flippin
Marion County
            Ark

MARRIAGES.

Morgan A. Norman
and Savannah Loper
was married July the
29th 1869

Asa Baker and Lizzie Norman was married
Sept 19th 1872

William H. Norman
and Sofie Baker
day married Jany the
11th 1874

John F. Norman and
Marga A. Alexander was
married July the 2nd
1874

F. M. Norman
Married April
1868 to
Amanda Baker
blocks: Bible record of Green Hill Norman & Edgar H. Rosson, & Norman
Dau. of Henry Rosson, & wife, Rebecca, of Tenn.
at Mt. Home Baxter Co. Ark.
Asa Baker and Lizzie Norman was married
